introSection: Rookie Racer is a steel roller coaster currently operating at Six Flags St. Louis in Eureka, Missouri, USA. It opened on September 30, 2023.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride was announced on March 1, 2023.

A new queue switchback section was added for the 2024 season.

fullText:
Rookie Racer is a steel roller coaster currently operating at Six Flags St. Louis in Eureka, Missouri, USA. It opened on September 30, 2023.

The ride was announced on March 1, 2023.

A new queue switchback section was added for the 2024 season.
